# Visual Evidence

Visual Evidence publishes existing PNG files as durable, exact-revision GitHub
pull-request evidence. Screenshot capture is deliberately external.

## Agent entry point

Run `visual-evidence describe --json` once. It returns the installed protocol,
commands, accepted options, environment contract, routine workflow, exit codes,
and error codes in one compact response.

Set `GITHUB_TOKEN`; never put a token in command arguments or logs. Publishing is
idempotent. Treat a nonzero exit code or `{"ok":false}` as failure.

## Repository references

- Agent skill: `skills/visual-evidence/SKILL.md`
- Result schema: `schema/agent-protocol-v1.json`
- Evidence schema: `schema/evidence-manifest-v1.schema.json`
- Advisory review schema: `schema/ai-review-v1.schema.json`
- GitHub Action: `WoolData/visual-evidence@v0.2.4`
- Native and .NET tool packages: GitHub Releases
- Full human documentation: `README.md`
